date_field.title: Date Field (incremental)
date_field.description: Which date field to filter on for incremental loads. Leave empty for a full load. Only some endpoints offer date filters.

date_from.title: Date From
date_from.description: Lower bound for the selected date field. Accepts 'last_run' (continue from last run), a relative value like 'yesterday' or '5 days ago', or an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Applies only when a Date Field is set.
